Access to the Campus

By Metro

You can take the

M2 Yenikapı-Hacıosman

line and get off at the

to reach our campus in Cibali by metro. You can reach our campus in about 10 minutes by walking from the Golden Horn stop. It is possible to come to our campus using other rail systems and transfer stations.

Please check the network maps:

https://www.metro.istanbul/YolcuHizmetleri/AgHaritalari

By Tram

The

Cibali

stop of the

is located opposite the main entrance of our campus. You can easily reach our campus by using this line.

Please check the network maps:

https://www.metro.istanbul/YolcuHizmetleri/AgHaritalari

By Metrobus

To reach our campus, you can take the reciprocal metrobus lines between

34

Avcılar-Zincirlikuyu,

34A

Cevizlibağ-Söğütlüçeşme or

34G

Ayvansaray

stop. You can take

bus 399C

from the Ayvansaray stop and get off at the

Unkapanı-Kadir Has University stop

, or

bus 1453

from the Feshane stop under the Haliç Bridge and get off at the

stop and walk to our campus.

Please check this website:

By Ferry

You can access our campus with all ferries and motorboats arriving at

Eminönü pier/ferry port

. The following lines, departing from Eminönü bus stops, pass through the

Unkapanı-Kadir Has University stop
